violations.text: Raw animal foods (raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (packaged deli meat) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

(Various pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: -patient cooler door handle wrapped in tape -patient grab and go cooler damaged being held attached to base with plastic bag. Equipment must be in good repair and/or proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: -steam table shelves -prep tables shelves -exterior of stackable refrigerator units -grill shelves Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per PIC, cleaning company to service facility on 4/16/26. Company expected to complete a detailed cleaning of floors, walls, and ceilings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Allergen statements are lacking at several stations in retail area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Ice machine taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

(Beef ) was observed thawing on the counter. ROP Salmon salmon was observed thawing in walk in cooler with package still intact. Temperatures was observed at 33-37 DF. PIC removed salmon from package and return to walk in for proper thawing. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.The power towel dispenser in retail area was not in good repair.Observed not dispensing paper towel. 2.Handwashing sink in the kitchen observed detaching from wall(sealant removed and/or damaged). 3.Observed cloths being used in prep unit to collect the condensate from unit. Equipment must be maintained and good repair and/or proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.food storage carts 2.exterior of stackable coolers 3.stove hoods(retail area) 4.under steam tables 5.prep table shelves New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (back kitchen area near food storage room ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (food prep) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer, shelves under retail steam tables, and hood vents ) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen near storage rooms ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Observed hose in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Observed fans/vents in reach-in refrigerator to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
